q4_note: MatMul-4bit skips the embedding Gather (128K x 312 ~40M params stays fp32) -> 163MB. Only int8 quantize_dynamic compresses embeddings -> 44.8MB floor. <30MB needs non-standard int4-embedding quant (quality risk).
deployable_estimate: int8 model 44.8MB + tokenizer 3.6MB ~= 48MB shipped; + JS multi-head decode port + onnxruntime-web Worker
